title: Meet your World Cup quarterfinalists! How they got...
summary: The 2026 World Cup has reached the quarterfinals with eight teams remaining, each three wins away from lifting the trophy after four weeks of competition.
content: And then there were eight. Four weeks after the World Cup began, the quarterfinals start on Thursday with each team three wins away from lifting the trophy.

zh.title: 认识世界杯四强队伍！他们如何进入...
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯进入四分之一决赛，还剩八支球队，每队距离在经过四周比赛后举起奖杯还需赢三场。

title: Premier League 2026-27 kits: Ranking every jersey ...
summary: Premier League clubs are releasing their 2026-27 kits nearly two months ahead of the new season's start.
content: It's still almost two months before the new Premier League season begins, but plenty of top clubs have already released some of their 2026-27 kits.

zh.title: 英超2026-27赛季球衣：对每件球衣的排名...
zh.summary: 英超俱乐部在新赛季开始前近两个月发布了2026-27赛季球衣。

title: Copy of Copy of So, Ronaldo's World Cup era is over. Where did eac...
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career has ended following Portugal's loss to Spain in the round of 16, marking the conclusion of a significant chapter in his playing career.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo said this would be his last World Cup, and after losing to Spain on Monday night, this chapter of his incredible career is now closed. Let's look back to see where each campaign went wrong.

zh.title: 副本 副本 那么，罗纳尔多的世界杯时代结束了。每支球队在哪里...
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多随葡萄牙队在16强中不敌西班牙，他的世界杯职业生涯宣告结束，这标志着他职业生涯中一个重要篇章的终结。

title: Grades for every team eliminated from the World Cu...
summary: All 47 teams eliminated from the 2026 World Cup are being graded on how their tournament performances compared to pre-tournament expectations.
content: When the World Cup ends, 47 teams will have been eliminated, and we're grading every one on how its run compared with expectations.

zh.title: 世界杯被淘汰球队成绩评分
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯的47支被淘汰球队都根据其赛事表现与赛前预期的对比情况获得评分。

title: Marcotti's Mini World Cup Musings: Messi is supern...
summary: During the first rest day of the 2026 World Cup, football analyst Marcotti reflects on four weeks of tournament action and key developments.
content: After 28 days of games, Wednesday is the first rest day of the 2026 World Cup: the perfect opportunity to reflect on four weeks of fabulous football.

zh.title: 马尔科蒂的世界杯随笔：梅西超凡入圣
zh.summary: 在2026年世界杯的第一个休息日，足球分析师马尔科蒂回顾了四周的赛事进展和关键动态。

title: Egypt FA: Can't be silent on Argentina referee cal...
summary: The Egyptian FA has formally protested the refereeing decisions in their round-of-16 loss to Argentina at the World Cup, refusing to remain silent on the matter.
content: The Egyptian FA said it "cannot remain silent regarding the refereeing decisions" following the team's round-of-16 loss to Argentina at the World Cup.

zh.title: 埃及足协：对阿根廷裁判判罚不能保持沉默
zh.summary: 埃及足协正式抗议其在世界杯1/8决赛中对阿根廷比赛的裁判判罚，拒绝在此事上保持沉默。

title: EU lawmakers eye investigating FIFA's Infantino
summary: European lawmakers are seeking to launch a formal investigation into FIFA President Gianni Infantino's involvement in permitting U.S. striker Folarin Balogun to play despite a previous red card.
content: Dozens of European lawmakers are gathering support to launch an investigation in the European Parliament of FIFA boss Gianni Infantino over his involvement in the decision to permit U.S. striker Folarin Balogun to play despite an earlier red card.

zh.title: 欧盟议员调查国际足联主席因凡蒂诺
zh.summary: 欧洲议员正在寻求对国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺进行正式调查，涉及其是否允许美国前锋弗拉伦·巴洛贡在曾被罚红牌的情况下参赛。

title: ⚽ World Cup Golden Boot tracker: Messi leads
summary: Lionel Messi leads the race for the Golden Boot as the 2026 World Cup's top goal scorer heading into the quarterfinals.
content: We're into the quarterfinals at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and the race for the Golden Boot -- given to the tournament's top goal scorer -- is red-hot.

zh.title: ⚽ 世界杯金靴奖追踪：梅西领先
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西在2026年世界杯金靴奖的争夺中领先，作为目前得分最多的射手，即将进入四分之一决赛。

title: Mexico start Márquez era on 'strong foundation'
summary: Rafael Márquez has been appointed as Mexico's new head coach, taking over from Javier Aguirre with the mandate to lead the team toward the 2030 World Cup.
content: The Mexican Football Federation announced Wednesday that Rafael Márquez is taking the reins as Javier Aguirre's successor to lead the team up to the 2030 World Cup.

zh.title: 墨西哥以'坚实基础'开启马里克斯时代
zh.summary: 拉斐尔·马里克斯被任命为墨西哥新任主教练，接替哈维尔·阿圭罗，肩负率领球队冲向2030年世界杯的使命。

title: Sources: Tchouaméni agrees new Real Madrid deal
summary: Real Madrid midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni has agreed to a new contract extension with the Spanish club through 2031.
content: Real Madrid midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni has agreed a new contract to tie him to the Spanish giants until 2031, sources confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：图哈梅尼同意皇马新合同
zh.summary: 皇马中场球员奥里利安·图哈梅尼已同意与西班牙俱乐部签订新的合同延期，合同期至2031年。

title: Sources: Arsenal to step up Guimarães interest
summary: Arsenal is intensifying their pursuit of Newcastle midfielder Bruno Guimarães after receiving encouragement of his interest, though finalizing the transfer fee remains a significant challenge.
content: Arsenal are set to step up their interest in Bruno Guimarães after receiving encouragement that the midfielder wants to join them but agreeing a fee with Newcastle remains a significant stumbling block, sources told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：阿森纳加强对吉马拉艾斯的追求
zh.summary: 在收到他有意加盟的信号后，阿森纳正在加强对纽卡斯尔中场球员布鲁诺·吉马拉艾斯的争取，但确定转会费仍是重大难题。

title: Messi, Ream, Berhalter headline MLS ASG roster
summary: Lionel Messi and several U.S. players including Matt Freese, Max Arfsten, Tim Ream, and Sebastian Berhalter have been selected for the MLS All-Star Game roster.
content: Argentina and Inter Miami CF star Lionel Messi and U.S. players Matt Freese, Max Arfsten, Tim Ream and Sebastian Berhalter were included in MLS' 29-man All-Star Game roster.

zh.title: 梅西、里姆、贝哈尔特领衔MLS全明星赛名单
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西及包括马特·弗里斯、马克斯·阿夫斯滕、蒂姆·里姆和塞巴斯蒂安·贝哈尔特在内的多名美国球员被选入MLS全明星赛大名单。

title: Sources: Utd, Chelsea agree $67M deal for Santos
summary: Manchester United and Chelsea have agreed on a $67 million transfer deal for midfielder Andrey Santos.
content: Manchester United have agreed a deal with Chelsea for midfielder Andrey Santos, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士:曼联、切尔西同意以6700万美元交易得到桑托斯
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特联队和切尔西已同意以6700万美元的价格交易购得中场球员安德烈·桑托斯。

title: 2x Ballon d'Or winner Putellas joins London City
summary: Two-time Ballon d'Or winner Alexia Putellas, the former Barcelona star, has joined London City Lionesses.
content: Two-time Ballon d'Or winner and former Barcelona star Alexia Putellas has joined London City Lionesses.

zh.title: 两次金球奖得主普特拉斯加入伦敦城女足
zh.summary: 两次金球奖得主、前巴塞罗那球星阿莱克西亚·普特拉斯已加入伦敦城女足。
